title: AWS Lambda Execution Role Risk
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how Lambda execution roles create workload identity risk when function update authority, iam:PassRole, Secrets Manager access, KMS decrypt, and resource permissions combine.
objectives: Explain what a Lambda execution role is
Differentiate function management permissions from execution-role permissions
Understand how iam:PassRole affects Lambda role attachment
Reason about function code update authority and runtime identity
Explain how Lambda roles can reach Secrets Manager and KMS
Understand why workload identity risk is an applied L2 bridge to Principal LABs
Prepare learners for PassRole, role chaining, and cross-account escalation analysis
